reviews.review_description: I really enjoy this card game.   It’s a form of Solitaire.  It’s easy to play but not easy to master.  And, when you lose, you fall back a level.  There is only one environment but I like it.   If you like Solitaire, you will enjoy this game and this is the only Solitaire game I have found for VR.

If you like TriPeaks Solitaire, and think you might enjoy playing it in VR, this is what you want.  Great core mechanics, great UI, and the virtual environment is _excellent_.  I recommend that you turn the resolution right up in the options for the best experience.

Great developer too.  Very receptive to feedback and quick to implement improvements.  I'm inclined to rate this 4 and a bit stars for the quality of the app alone, but I'm rounding up for the quality of the support :)
Love TriPeaks and this is a cool version.
Good game if you like cards
Go to game when I just want to relax.
Fun card game and it passes time. I like the setting, but I wish they had more spaces so you won’t be sitting in the same living room. Also maybe more card games because it gets pretty repetitive.

This is an ok solitaire game but it is unpolished. The stupid graphics when you lose a game are unnecessary and time consuming. Why can’t I just start a new game instead of going back to the start menu. Could be much better with a few modifications.
I was very impressed by how good it looks and plays.  I would absolutely recommend.  Make sure to turn off the music though in the settings as well as set to the highest quality.

I Give It 5 Stars

Great Music & Graphic
Is Good Therapy For Me.
It Helps Me Focusing Cards
And Is Good Game To Relax.
Lovely room to play cards in and relaxing music. Card game itself is very simple but keeps drawing you in to one more round!

I was looking for a nice addicting card game to play with relaxing music, and this game did not disappoint.  I enjoyed the effects it makes for getting combos as well.  I would give this game a 5 out of 5 but the cards are at a position where you have to look down too much while playing.  I realize there is an option in the menu to move the cards in a further back position, but it is still a smidge to close for my comfort when playing for a long period of time.  Its so close to being awesome, please move the cards back a little more in your next update.

developer_response.body:
Hi there and thanks for your feedback!
I just updated the game and added the 4th option which is now far far away. I hope you like it. ;)
